evidence: "Great little movie! Shows how a couple can split but still remain a family and love one another."
"An easy movie that you don't have to think through."
"It is especially enjoyable for a mother-daughter watch and brings back warm memories for those of us who grew up in the sixties."
"Great story, moves fast and has lots of excitement and friendship without the undercurrent of sexy as seen in so many current films."
"This was one of my daughter's favorite movies when experiencing a divorce in the family."
"Don't know why, but thoroughly enjoyed this movie, explosions gunfire and all."
"Loved this holiday movie and was happy to add it to the collection."
"Was so disappointed being a Bruce Willis fan."
"If you were a fan, you will be left with your hands out wanting to grab more!"
"Funny, but I usually don't like things blowing up or action movies."
"This was one of my daughter's favorite movies when experiencing a divorce in the family."
"It is especially enjoyable for a mother-daughter watch and brings back warm memories for those of us who grew up in the sixties."

summary: The user enjoys light-hearted family comedies with simple narratives and fast pacing. They value emotional connections in stories, particularly those that resonate with family themes, and show a preference for humor over action or complexity.
